hero_desc: Just add a task ID to your commit — we'll handle the rest. Sync your workflow directly from your terminal to the dashboard.
how_desc: The modern workflow for teams who live in the terminal and dream in clean UI.
phase1_desc: Define your objective in the Kinetic dashboard. Every task gets a unique technical ID instantly, synced across your team's workspace.
phase2_desc: Work locally. When you commit, prefix your message with the task ID. Our GitHub integration listens for changes and updates the state automatically.
phase3_desc: The commit history, PR status, and code changes are aggregated into a single view for the Team Lead to approve, merging code and tasks in one flow.
footer_desc: Automating project management for technical teams. Built on the edge of Git and productivity.

testimonial_2: Working with commits is now effortless.

hero_sub: GitHub shows you code — GitLuma shows you the work. Commits, tasks and team in one place, synced in real time.
git_sub: Connect GitHub, ship commits, grow your team — all in one flow
feat_sub: Built for teams who ship fast and communicate clearly
feat1_d: New commits appear instantly — no refresh needed. Your team stays in sync via WebSockets.
feat2_d: Connect your repository with one click. Webhooks auto-configured and secured.
feat3_d: Invite members, assign tasks, track progress together in real time.
feat4_d: Send invites with a link. Members click and are auto-added to the project.
how_sub: No configuration headaches — GitLuma handles the setup so you focus on shipping
how1_d: Sign in with your GitHub account. GitLuma syncs your repositories automatically.
how2_d: Choose a repository and create a workspace. Webhooks are auto-wired for real-time commits.
how3_d: Invite teammates, assign tasks and get notified on every commit — from one dashboard.

test_sub: Trusted by engineering teams who ship daily
test_q1: GitLuma changed how our team works. Every developer knows exactly what task their commit belongs to — no more switching between Jira and GitHub.
test_q2: Working with commits is now effortless. I type the task ID, push, and the dashboard updates instantly. It feels like magic for a distributed team.
test_q3: Perfect tool for team collaboration. Real-time notifications mean our PM is always in the loop without pinging developers every hour.
price_sub: Start free. Upgrade when your team grows.
price_starter_desc: Perfect for solo devs and open-source projects.
price_pro_desc: For growing teams who need unlimited power.
faqs_sub: Everything you need to know about GitLuma. Can't find an answer?
faqs_q1: How does GitLuma connect to GitHub?
faqs_a1: GitLuma uses GitHub OAuth 2.0 for authentication — one click and you're in. We automatically discover your repositories and configure webhooks without any manual setup. You stay in full control of which repos are tracked.
faqs_q2: What happens when I push a commit?
faqs_a2: GitHub sends a webhook event to GitLuma instantly. We parse the commit message for task IDs (e.g. GLM-1), update the linked task's status in real time, and push a WebSocket notification to all team members who have the dashboard open.
faqs_q3: Is my code or repository content stored?
faqs_a3: No. GitLuma only processes commit metadata — author, message, timestamp and branch name. Your actual source code never touches our servers.
faqs_q4: Can I use GitLuma with private repositories?
faqs_a4: Yes. Private repositories are fully supported on all plans. GitLuma requests the minimum GitHub OAuth scopes needed — read access to repos and webhook management.
faqs_q5: How do task IDs work in commit messages?
faqs_a5: Prefix your commit with a task ID: git commit -m "GLM-1: add login flow". GitLuma matches the pattern, moves the task to In Progress on first commit and Done when you merge to main.
faqs_q6: Can I invite teammates who don't have a GitHub account?
faqs_a6: Teammates join GitLuma via an email invitation link. Once they sign in with their own GitHub account, they're auto-added to your project. GitHub is required for all members.
faqs_q7: What is the difference between Pro and Team plans?
faqs_a7: Pro is great for growing teams up to 15 people with full analytics, unlimited projects and 30-day history. Team adds unlimited seats, custom webhooks, full API access, SSO, audit logs and a dedicated support channel.
faqs_a8: Self-hosted GitLuma is on our roadmap for Team plan customers. Sign up to the waitlist in your dashboard and we'll notify you when the Docker image is ready.
